messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return compact_key_value_v1 only: exactly one key=value line for each required key, in order.
No JSON, no braces, no quotes, no markdown fences, no prose outside the key=value lines.
Use | for cited_evidence, open_blockers, and critical_features_preserved list values.
Keep values short. Keep final_answer 25-80 words.

routing_lens.blocked_move: do not decide from anomaly tone alone
routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: callback is stale and scoped to a prior invoice.

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

structured_canonical_state.USER_GOAL: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
SETTLED_DECISIONS: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
Workers return compact key=value lines only.
structured_canonical_state.system_role: HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.

turns_completed.output_summary: Gov local verdict ESCALATE route FINAL_COMPILER

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "_worker_output_format": "compact_key_value_v1",
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May AP execute payment? Callback stale and scoped to prior invoice.",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "Source records do not close action boundary",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "SRC-85E56C34309F-CTL",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "Open dependency on callback date and invoice scope",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "callback date and invoice scope unresolved"
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "SRC-85E56C34309F-CTL",
    "SRC-85E56C34309F-BND"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source IDs",
    "action boundary",
    "policy exact-match rule"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Control record SRC-85E56C34309F-CTL leaves callback date and invoice scope open. Exact source boundary not closed. Escalate; no execution authority from stale notes or prior history.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "callback date and invoice scope"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.

rules: Return exactly one key=value line for each required key.
No JSON, no braces, no quotes, no markdown, no prose outside the lines.
Use | to separate list items. Use an empty value when no blockers exist.

field_bounds.controlling_source_fact: one exact source doc_id or short source-bound fact
field_bounds.cited_evidence: pipe-separated exact source doc_id values, max 8

source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: callback is stale and scoped to a prior invoice.

context.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: callback is stale and scoped to a prior invoice.
context.anomaly_observed: release the payment because vendor history, urgent tone, or prior paperwork appears reassuring
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the frozen AP source records close the exact action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Request context for CASE-85E56C34309F: an operator asks whether to proceed with callback is stale and scoped to a prior invoice. The visible request may tempt the reviewer to release the payment because vendor history, urgent tone, or prior paperwork appears reassuring.

Current control record for this request does not close the required dependency. The record for callback date and invoice scope is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action than callback is stale and scoped to a prior invoice.
Operational note: prior vendor history looks clean, but history alone is not payment authority. Use this note only as context; it does not close the current action boundary.
Communication boundary: prior callback cannot approve current payment. The AP operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, or prior convenience.

policy_documents.title: Frozen AP source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Policy rule for payment system: execution may proceed only when the current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.
